name: broc
description: Broc browser automation via native messaging (Firefox + Chrome)

scripts.dev:launch: wait-on dist/cli.mjs dist/mcp-server.mjs dist/firefox/manifest.json dist/chrome/manifest.json && nodemon --watch dist/cli.mjs --watch dist/mcp-server.mjs --watch dist/firefox/background.js --watch dist/firefox/content.js --watch dist/firefox/manifest.json --watch dist/chrome/background.js --watch dist/chrome/content.js --watch dist/chrome/manifest.json --ext js,mjs,json --delay 300ms --signal SIGTERM --exec "npm run launch -- --browser=chrome"
